---
name: error-notifier
version: 1.0.0
description: |
  Monitors for runtime errors and exceptions in your code. Reports them with
  suggested fixes.
  Use when asked to "watch for errors" or "monitor exceptions".
  Proactively suggest when the user reports an error, sees an exception, or
  when tests fail.
allowed-tools:
  - Bash
  - Read
---

# error-notifier

Runtime error monitoring and reporting.
